scenes.phrase: You've paid Spotify more money every single year
since 2023. And artists are getting paid less per stream than ever.
Let me say that again, because it should be the most insane sentence in the music industry,
and somehow nobody talks about it.
You, the listener, are paying more for Spotify today than you have ever paid in the company's 18-year history.
Spotify raised its prices in 2023. Then again in 2024. Then again in 2025, and...
